channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Michigan Senate Race: El-Sayed's Connections Raise Antisemitism Concerns
item.description: Jewish voters in Michigan express concerns about antisemitism related to Abdul El-Sayed's Senate campaign amid heightened state tensions.

item.title: Senator Praises Charity Amid Scrutiny of Parent Group
item.description: Sen. John Cornyn has publicly supported Islamic Relief USA as its parent organization faces scrutiny regarding potential terror links and antisemitism.

item.title: Markwayne Mullin on Newsmax: DHS Continues Deportation Efforts
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin stated the Trump administration is maintaining current immigration enforcement practices.

item.title: California Judge Reportedly Intervened in Case Involving Death of Jewish Man
